title: {{productName}}
description: Complete console account login, upgrade application, and upgrade execution locally.

errors.startConsoleLogin: Failed to start console account login
errors.finishConsoleLogin: Failed to complete console login callback
errors.logoutConsoleLogin: Failed to log out console account
errors.downgradeProPackage: Failed to downgrade to OSS edition

consoleLogin.title: Console Account Login
consoleLogin.description: Start login locally, sign in on console, and return to local confirmation.
consoleLogin.missingAccountHint: Current session does not include account name, please log out and log in again.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to {{productName}}
upgrade.description: Review the current license information, submit applications, and track approval status.
upgrade.installedDescription: {{productName}} is installed and the license is activated.
upgrade.consoleSyncWarning: Console license sync is temporarily unavailable. Local license status was refreshed. {{message}}
upgrade.downgradeDialogDescription: This removes the local {{productName}} component and restarts the service. Existing upgrade requests and Licenses will not be withdrawn or revoked.
upgrade.downgradeConsoleSyncHint: After the local Pro component is removed, Console will be synced to record this installation as returned to OSS. If sync fails, the local downgrade marker is kept so sync can be retried after the issue is fixed.
upgrade.downgradingHint: Removing the local {{productName}} component. Console will be synced after removal succeeds.
upgrade.waitingDowngradeRestart: Pro component removed. Waiting for service to restart as OSS...
upgrade.revokedOrExpiredHint: The current license is no longer valid. You can submit a new {{productName}} application.
upgrade.loginFirst: Log in console account before applying for upgrade.
upgrade.pendingRequestExists: An upgrade request is already active. Refresh status or cancel it before creating a new one.
upgrade.installingHint: Downloading and installing the {{productName}} component. OSS core will not be upgraded.
upgrade.waitingRestart: Upgrade is installed. Waiting for service restart...
upgrade.restartTimeout: Service restart timed out. Refresh later to confirm status.
upgrade.afterUpgradeHint: Starting upgrade will download the Pro bundle, install only the flockspro wheel, and restart automatically.
upgrade.salesRepHintPrefix: If you do not have a sales representative, please visit
upgrade.notesPlaceholder: Notes (optional, e.g. main use cases, scheduled tasks, daily token consumption)
upgrade.formRequiredError: Company, applicant name, applicant email, and applicant phone are required
upgrade.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid applicant email.
upgrade.invalidPhoneError: Please enter a valid applicant phone number (international numbers supported).

sensitiveDetection.title: Prompt Redaction
sensitiveDetection.description: When enabled, sensitive values in user, assistant, and tool messages are replaced before model input.
sensitiveDetection.promptHintDescription: Add guidance for passing replaced values to tools. Recommended on; disabling it may make models treat values as template variables.

errors.fetch: Failed to load prompt redaction settings
errors.save: Failed to save prompt redaction settings
errors.fetchSettings: Failed to load sensitive detection settings
errors.updateSettings: Failed to save sensitive detection settings

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.description: Review Pro audit events with filters for event type, actor, and time range.

errors.forbidden: Only admins can view audit logs
errors.unavailable: Audit logs are not available in this edition
